commit.author: FlexNetOS <flexnetos@de-flex.net>

lines.content: ## Current Focus
Org-audit mission verified and closed (2026-06-12): POLICY v2 + fleet audit + protection rollout +
autonomous-loop e2e proof all adversarially re-verified against live state. Parent meta main CI is
green for the first time since 2026-06-04, confirmed on two consecutive main commits (PR #11 merged
b12f3c7ab; docs PR #12 merged f48ad885 — all five mission docs now tracked on main).
NEXT MISSION (user directive 2026-06-12): **meta portability / dependency internalization** — all
deps inside meta, user-global paths hold only symlinks INTO meta. Prompt: `PORTABILITY-SESSION-PROMPT.md`
at meta root. HFTASK queue resumes after.
PORTABILITY MISSION wave 1 done (2026-06-12 late evening, ADR-0006): envctl = box materializer;
envctl/home/ = canonical home tree; **40 symlinks now point into meta (was 3)**; yazelix homed
(FlexNetOS/yazelix fork, pin e60d15e); stale cargo-bin weave dead (HF_WEAVE_BIN obsolete);
bootstrap.sh on meta PR #17. Full state: PORTABILITY-AUDIT.md (incl. APPLIED + residue).
A PARALLEL session ran the upgrade mission simultaneously (meta #13/#15/#16, handoff ADR-0003/4/5,
steward model) — SESSION-HANDOFF.md carries BOTH session-5 packets.
## Recent Activities
- Verification session: all claim clusters PASS; full evidence in VERIFICATION-REPORT.md (meta root).
- handoff#4 + meta#11 both completed by GitHub-native auto-merge (the fail-closed model, twice more in production).
## Immediate Next Steps
1. Portability mission (`PORTABILITY-SESSION-PROMPT.md`): inventory external deps → ADR → internalize
(yazelix, ~/.local/bin binary copies, ~/.claude settings) → fresh-clone proof.
2. Watch meta PR #14 (Release Please GITHUB_TOKEN fallback, auto-merge armed) + first post-fix
On Push run; resolve [[incidents/release-please-token-unavailable]] on green.
3. HFTASK-0007 (P0): `hf session start|end` + kasetto preflight + session-ledger location.
4. HFTASK-0003/0019 (P0/P1): Intent→envelope synthesis + transport ADR (research first).
5. Human queue: NEEDS-HUMAN.md (7 items, none actioned; item 2 sharpened with the PAT-grant command).
1. Verify watcher results: meta PR #14 (Release Please fallback) + #17 (portability) merged green;
first post-#14 On Push run = the [[incidents/release-please-token-unavailable]] resolution evidence.
2. Portability wave 2 (residue in PORTABILITY-AUDIT.md): rtk sync→relink, kasetto/meta-mcp builds+links,
/usr/local/bin sudo phase, absolute-path substitution, work-dir relocations, virgin-home proof.
3. [[incidents/repowire-unit-crash-loop]]: owner questions (restore as component vs retire).
4. HFTASK queue resumes after wave 2 (0007 first); owner queue in NEEDS-HUMAN.md (steward model).

commit.message: Active context: portability wave 1 applied (40 links), PRs in flight, wave-2 residue
